# Create publication-quality volcano plot for cDNA
cdna_volcano_plot <- ggplot(volcano_data, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), color = sig)) +
# Optional: Add gene labels for top significant genes
# Identify top genes to label (most significant up and down)
cat("Upregulated genes (FC > 2, padj < 0.05):", sum(volcano_data$sig == "Upregulated", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Downregulated genes (FC < -2, padj < 0.05):", sum(volcano_data$sig == "Downregulated", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Total significant genes:", sum(volcano_data$sig %in% c("Upregulated", "Downregulated", "Significant"), na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
